'''Grassling''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served aboard ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' during the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
